releaseNotes: Adds a live notification shade summary for battery, CPU, RAM, internet, and analysis.
Adds an offline alert when the phone can no longer reach the Mac after a successful connection.
Adds a Mac companion app and live update manifest endpoint.
Adds automatic manifest checks on app launch and from the background notification service.
Adds update notifications with an Update action.
Adds in-app update popup and APK download/install flow.
